title: Techmania
body:
This modpack intends to bring a bunch of big tech mods together to all mesh for a chaotic masterpiece of technological innovations by using mods like Gregtech, Industrial Revolution, and Tech reborn in one big interconnected tech family. 

discord
[https://discord.gg/4rzswEhc3v]
